message:
fix(ci): remove submodules boolean that breaks checkout in all build jobs

The `submodules: false` (YAML boolean) on the build checkout step was
being interpreted by actions/checkout@v4 as `submodules: recursive`,
causing every build job to fail with:
  "fatal: No url found for submodule path 'legacy_pi_mono_code/pi-mono'
   in .gitmodules"

The gate job (which omits the submodules key entirely) succeeded because
the actions/checkout default is the string "false". Removing the explicit
boolean lets the default take effect, matching the gate job behavior.

This has blocked all release builds (including ARM64 Linux) since v0.1.2.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -137,7 +137,6 @@ jobs:
           path: pi_agent_rust
           fetch-depth: 0
           ref: ${{ needs.plan.outputs.tag }}
-          submodules: false
 
       - name: Ensure submodule content exists
         run: |
